recommendations.title: Hello, Dolly!
recommendations.overview: Dolly Levi is a strong-willed matchmaker who travels to Yonkers, New York in order to see the miserly "well-known unmarried half-a-millionaire" Horace Vandergelder. In doing so, she convinces his niece, his niece's intended, and Horace's two clerks t

recommendations.title: Love, Divided
recommendations.overview: Valentina is a young pianist starting over. Her neighbor David is an inventor who hates noise. And a paper-thin wall is about to become their matchmaker.

recommendations.title: London
recommendations.overview: London is a drug laden adventure that centers on a party in a New York loft where a young man is trying to win back his ex-girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Sharper
recommendations.overview: A small, wealthy family in New York City gets progressively torn apart by secrets, lies, and the theft that orchestrates all of it.

recommendations.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A guarded woman finds out she's dying of cancer but, when she meets her match, the threat of falling in love is scarier than death.

recommendations.title: Clueless
recommendations.overview: Shallow, rich and socially successful Cher is at the top of her Beverly Hills high school's pecking scale. Seeing herself as a matchmaker, Cher first coaxes two teachers into dating each other. Emboldened by her success, she decides to give hopelessl

recommendations.title: 200 Cigarettes
recommendations.overview: In 1981 New York City, a collection of twentysomethings try to cope with relationships, loneliness, desire and their individual neuroses on New Years Eve.

recommendations.title: How to Be Single
recommendations.overview: New York City is full of lonely hearts seeking the right match, and what Alice, Robin, Lucy, Meg, Tom and David all have in common is the need to learn how to be single in a world filled with ever-evolving definitions of love.

recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: Those People
recommendations.overview: On Manhattan's gilded Upper East Side, a young gay painter is torn between an obsession with his infamous best friend and a promising new romance with an older foreign pianist.
